content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(6, 9, 0), (0, 7, 3), (0, 4, 4), (3, 8, 4), (3, 5, 6), (1, 3, 7), (3, 4, 7), (4, 9, 7), (1, 7, 8), (2, 9, 8), (2, 7, 10), (8, 9, 11), (5, 6, 12), (1, 4, 14), (1, 8, 14), (0, 2, 15), (4, 8, 16), (0, 9, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 11.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 11:

* Edge (6, 9, 0) has node 6 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 7, 3) has node 0 and time 3. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 4, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (3, 8, 4) has node 3 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 5, 6) has node 3 and time 6. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 3, 7) has node 1 and time 7. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (3, 4, 7) has node 3 and time 7. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (4, 9, 7) has node 4 and time 7. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 7, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 9, 8) has node 2 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 10) has node 2 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (8, 9, 11) has node 8 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 6, 12) has node 5 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 4, 14) has node 1 and time 14. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 8, 14) has node 1 and time 14. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 2, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (4, 8, 16) has node 4 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 9, 19) has node 0 and time 19. -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 8 and 9.

Answer: [8, 9]
